name: ajaia-docs
description: Ajaia Docs — a lightweight collaborative document editor (docs-api + docs-web).

scripts.install:all: cd docs-api && bun install && cd ../docs-web && bun install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.typecheck: cd docs-api && bun run typecheck && cd ../docs-web && bunx tsc --noEmit
scripts.setup: bun run install:all && bun run db:up && bun run migrate && bun run seed
